info.title: Northflow Payment Orchestration Service API
info.description: Backend-to-backend REST API for Northflow Payment Orchestration. All /v1/* routes require API key bearer auth. CORS is disabled by default; browser clients must not call this API directly.

tags.name: Payment Methods
tags.description: Provider account payment method management and merchant payment options

tags.name: API Clients
tags.description: API client credential and signing key lifecycle

tags.name: Merchant Webhooks
tags.description: Merchant outbound webhook endpoints, deliveries, and replay

apiKey.description: Public merchant API key. Required for protected /v1/... routes except /v1/webhooks.

providerAccountRef.description: Provider's own account identifier. Safe to store and return in responses.

rawSecret.description: Raw credential secret. Returned once only. Never echoed again.

rawSigningSecret.description: Raw signing secret. Returned once only. Never echoed again.

secretPrefix.description: First 8 chars of the secret (safe to display). Never the raw secret.

merchantIdHeader.name: x-payment-merchant-id
merchantIdHeader.description: Merchant ID header fallback. Used when merchantId is not in request body or query params.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key (for protected routes) or invalid webhook signature.

Forbidden.description: 403 — Scope denied or merchant access denied

error.message: amountDue must be a positive number.
Too many requests. Slow down and retry.

get.description: Returns 200 when the service is up. Used by load balancers and health-check probes.
Returns runtime readiness: DB configuration, registered providers, Xendit sandbox status. Does not expose secrets.

ok.description: true if DB is configured, false if not.

id.description: Optional explicit ID (UUID). Auto-generated if omitted.

post.description: Creates a payment provider account. `credentialsRef` accepted in body but never returned in responses.

credentialsRef.description: Env var name pointing to the secret. Never echoed in responses.

amountDue.description: Amount in smallest currency unit (e.g. IDR cents).

post.description: Initiates a gateway payment for an existing intent. Returns transaction + updated intent.
Crash-recovery endpoint. Recomputes intent totals from actual transaction state.
Polls the payment provider for the current transaction status and updates the DB if changed.

Initiate a full or partial refund for a succeeded payment transaction. Creates an outgoing refund transaction and calls the provider's refund API if supported, manual provider records an offline refund; gateway/sandbox providers without refund support return PROVIDER_REFUND_UNSUPPORTED.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: ID of the original payment transaction to refund

merchantId.description: Owner merchant ID (can also be supplied via x-payment-merchant-id header)

amount.description: Refund amount in smallest currency unit (e.g. IDR sen). Must be > 0 and ≤ refundable amount.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency key for replay/conflict protection.

providerRefunded.description: true if provider refund API was called; false for manual/offline replay/refund.

422.description: Transaction not refundable or refund amount exceeds refundable

post.description: Cancel a pending or requires_action payment transaction. Calls the provider's cancel API if supported, manual provider voids directly; gateway/sandbox providers without cancel support return PROVIDER_CANCEL_UNSUPPORTED. Intent totals are not changed (the transaction was never succeeded).

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: ID of the payment transaction to void

merchantId.description: Owner merchant ID (can also be supplied via x-payment-merchant-id header)

idempotencyKey.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency key for replay/conflict protection.

providerCancelled.description: true if provider cancel API was called; false for manual/offline replay/cancel.

422.description: Transaction not voidable in current state

post.description: Accepts webhook events from payment providers. Does NOT require a service token. Provider identity is verified via HMAC signature (when secret configured).

parameters.name: x-fakegateway-signature
parameters.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature for fake_gateway webhooks. Required when PAYMENT_ORCHESTRATION_FAKEGATEWAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET is set.

post.description: Simulates a FakeGateway payment confirmation. NOT available in NODE_ENV=production.

put.summary: Upsert a provider account payment method

post.summary: Sync provider account payment methods from provider

get.summary: List active payment methods for a merchant (across all provider accounts)
Get available payment options for a payment intent

post.summary: Create a new API client credential
Create a signing key for HMAC request signing
Create a merchant outbound webhook endpoint

rawSecret.description: Raw webhook secret. Returned once only. Store in a backend secret manager. Never echoed again.

post.summary: Disable a merchant outbound webhook endpoint

rawSecret.description: New raw secret returned once only.

post.summary: Replay a webhook delivery or re-fan-out an event

deliveryId.description: Replay a specific delivery by ID

eventId.description: Re-fan-out an event to all active endpoints
